paper_focus.title: Transverse tensile and fatigue properties of Fe-Mn-Al-C alloys
paper_focus.research_objective: To evaluate and compare the transverse tensile and fatigue behavior of Fe-Mn-Al-C alloys with different carbon contents and phase fractions, and to clarify the role of ferrite phase morphology in crack propagation anisotropy.
main_process_variables: phase fraction (fully austenite, 90% austenite/10% ferrite, 45% austenite/55% ferrite)
